name: Edgewater Park
description: Come play pickleball at Edgewater Park in Green River, WY! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: Contact Matt Bowen (307.448.0894) to schedule advanced games for other times or the weekend.

name: Garnet Park
description: Garnet Park is a place to play pickleball in Rock Springs, WY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Green River Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Green River Recreation Center in Green River, WY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Palisades Park
description: Come play pickleball at Palisades Park in Rock Springs, WY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Contact Matt Bowen (307.448.0894) to schedule advanced play 7 days/week.

name: Rock Springs Civic Center
description: Rock Springs Civic Center is a place to play pickleball in Rock Springs, WY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Rock Springs Family Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Rock Springs Family Rec Center in Rock Springs, WY! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
